title: What's new with data agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech presented updates on data analytics agents with new capabilities for data engineering, science, and conversational analytics. New developer tools including the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations enable building custom agents grounded in enterprise data, accessible via Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs like VSCode.
writeup: The video covers Google Cloud's updates to its data analytics agents, spanning data engineering, data science, and conversational analytics. It also introduces developer tooling: the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations for building custom agents grounded in enterprise data. The key takeaway is that these agents are reachable across multiple surfaces, including Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs such as VSCode.
